summary: All 10 slash commands are now bridged: 7 OpenSpec (agent-callable), 1 assess (agent-callable), 2 dashboard (interactive-only with structured refusal). Shared bridge singleton via getSharedBridge(). 12 dedicated bridge tests + 1295 total tests pass. Side-effect metadata verified: read for status/verify, workspace-write for propose/ff/archive.

constraints: All pi-kit slash commands must be registered with the shared SlashCommandBridge (getSharedBridge()) so execute_slash_command can discover and invoke them.
Interactive-only commands are bridged with agentCallable: false for structured refusals.
